top3.sql:
WITH partnership_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        bb.match_id,
        bb.striker AS player1_id,
        bb.non_striker AS player2_id,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS partnership_runs
    FROM ball_by_ball bb
    JOIN batsman_scored bs 
        ON bb.match_id = bs.match_id 
        AND bb.over_id = bs.over_id 
        AND bb.ball_id = bs.ball_id 
        AND bb.innings_no = bs.innings_no
    WHERE bb.striker != bb.non_striker
    GROUP BY bb.match_id, bb.striker, bb.non_striker
),
ranked_partnership...
